Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xCBA6 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Grand Prix Simulator.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $6300 lda #$37 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Grand Prix Simulator.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Inserted RLE packed colour RAM data to dump file at $6300 to restore before starting the game.
